insert.if: insert into comment_tbl values( comment_tbl_seq.nextval, #{commentType}, #{commentUserpickNo}, #{commentBoardNo}, #{commentMemberId}, #{commentContent}, sysdate, #{commentParentNo} )

insert into comment_tbl values( comment_tbl_seq.nextval, #{commentType}, (select userpick_movie_no from userpick_movie where userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = #{commentUserpickNo} and rownum = 1), #{commentBoardNo}, #{commentMemberId}, #{commentContent}, sysdate, #{commentParentNo} )
